## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy and align on next steps for Deepgram's SEO and content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content audit revealed misalignment between perceived and actual top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Need to reevaluate content categorization (top/middle/bottom funnel) for target audience and industries](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Action item: GrowthX to conduct deeper evaluation of existing content quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Postponed discussion on SEM strategy and programmatic SEO until after content audit](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit and Strategy Alignment

  - [ContentOS (Airtable) presented with 50+ potential blog topics across 4 main clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Discovered much existing "top of funnel" content is irrelevant (e.g., idiom explanations)](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Need to reassess what constitutes quality top/middle/bottom funnel content for Deepgram](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Goal: Drive organic traffic and console signups through targeted, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Content Clusters and Prioritization

  - [4 main topic clusters identified:](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
    1.  Voice AI and API evaluation
    2.  Industry-specific (e.g., medical)
    3.  DevRel "how to build" content
    4.  Enterprise focus (QSR/drive-thru and pharmacy)
  - [Aim to select 8-10 topics for initial focus, with one prioritized for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Keyword Strategy and SEO

  - [Initial keyword research complete, focusing on low-difficulty, high-opportunity keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Current rankings mostly for educational/informational content](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Need to close gaps for commercial and transactional keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Reevaluate existing content for relevance and conversion potential](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Content Management and Organization

  - [Discovered issues with content categorization and visibility on /learn page](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Some high-traffic content (e.g., idiom explanations) irrelevant to Deepgram's core offerings](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Need to audit content quality, relevance, and organization](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct deeper evaluation of existing content quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Reassess top/middle/bottom funnel content categorization for target audience and industries](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Perform keyword gap analysis focused on the 4 main topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Postpone SEM strategy and programmatic SEO discussion until after content audit](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Deepgram team to review updated content strategy proposal in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/AoQdM_Z8jWMhzJ5TTa1jYd5cXHwqz7Ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
